name: Linus Tech Tips
oneLine: Flagship Canadian tech review channel founded by Linus Sebastian in 2008, now the cornerstone of Linus Media Group.
bio: Linus Tech Tips is a YouTube channel started in November 2008 by Linus Sebastian while he was the on-camera presenter for Canadian retailer NCIX. It became the foundation of Linus Media Group (LMG), formally launched in 2013, of which Sebastian was CEO until July 2023 when he transitioned to chief vision officer. As of early 2026, the main channel has over 16 million subscribers and 9.2 billion views, covering hardware reviews, extreme PC builds, and tech industry commentary.
topics: data center and home lab projects
style: high-production, multi-camera, scripted reviews with running gags and lab-test segments
